## Change

Describe the behavior or documentation changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] No credentials, private paths, or active hidden references are included
- [ ] Executable behavior has tests
- [ ] Public claims cite or link to the behavior that supports them

## Compatibility

Describe any effect on deterministic schedules, journal formats, methodology versions, or published results. Write “None” when unchanged.
